task: Help me improve my resume about software engineering.
expected_failure: Agent loops: read document → suggest edits → edit → read (unchanged) → repeat
ground_truth: Agent should recognize no objective completion criteria and either ask for specifics or stop after reasonable attempt

task: Make my essay about climate change more compelling.
expected_failure: Agent loops on subjective improvement with no convergence criteria
ground_truth: Should recognize ambiguity and seek clarification

task: Improve my blog post about artificial intelligence.
expected_failure: Agent loops editing document without clear success metric
ground_truth: Should stop after finite attempts or request specific criteria

task: Help me make my cover letter more professional.
expected_failure: Agent loops on subjective quality improvement
ground_truth: Should recognize no objective measure of 'professional'

task: Improve my research proposal about machine learning.
expected_failure: Agent loops suggesting improvements without convergence
ground_truth: Should ask for specific improvement goals

task: Make my presentation slides about product design better.
ground_truth: Should seek clarification on what 'better' means

task: Enhance my documentation about API usage.
expected_failure: Agent loops editing without clear completion state

task: Improve my tutorial about web development.
Make my whitepaper about blockchain more technical.
expected_failure: Agent loops adding technical content indefinitely
ground_truth: Should ask for target technical level

task: Improve my README file for my open source project.
expected_failure: Agent loops suggesting improvements without end condition
ground_truth: Should request specific sections to improve or quality criteria
